source_pr.title: statistics,executor: fix some unit tests that run twice
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #22664 

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

How it Works:

The base test suite should not implement `TestXXX`, otherwise, the overloaded test suite will run the `TestXXX` twice. 


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note
